title: Friends Birthdays
description: Tests that the repo can store names, dates, and gift notes as simple stable reference material.

rounds.prompt: Friends birthdays: Maya on April 8, Theo on September 19, and Jules on December 2.
Add that Maya usually likes plants and Theo likes cookbooks.
Add that I already messaged Jules last year so I should remember to do it again this year.

finalAssertions.reason: Birthday tracking should remain plain reference data.
The system should support durable personal reference notes without turning them into conceptual clusters.
